privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real-world time-series data from the Numenta Anomaly Benchmark (NAB) dataset, including actual EC2 CPU utilization, disk writes, and server temperatures. The target outputs (a shell script and three 800x400 PNG images in /home/ga/reports/) and their minimum 2KB size constraint are explicitly detailed in the task description and verifier scripts.
